titleStmt.title: SII 38.148: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 148. (A.R. No. 148 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the eleventh pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the usual meykīrtti, Tiṅgaḷēr taru-taṉ.

It records that an individual Perumāṉ Madhurāntakaṉ alias Rājēndrachōḷa Veṅgaḷa-naṭṭaraiyaṉ made a gift of five vēli measured by the rod, śrī pādakkōl, after purchase from the ūrār of Eyilūrnilaiāmūr alias Śōḻēndraśiṅganallūr in Paiyyūrkōṭṭam, after freeing the land from taxes, for providing mid-night food offerings to the god at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu. The tax-dues on the land amounting to one hundred and fifty kalam of paddy measured by Arumoḻidēvaṉ-marakkāl was to be defrayed for acquiring various items required for providing offerings during the said service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kiḻ nila
makaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarnntu ceṅkolocci karuṅkali kaṭinntu taṉ
ciṟiyatātaiyeyum tiruttamaiyaṉaiyum kuṟikkoḷ taṉ Iḷaṅkokkaḷai
yum neṟiyuṇar taṉ tirupputalvar tammaiyum tuṉṟeḻil vāṉavaṉ
villavar miṉavaṉ Ilaṅkaiyiṟkiṟaivaṉ puṉaṅkaḻaṟ pallavaṉ kaṉṉara
kucciyark [kāvalaneṉp poṉnāṇi cūṭarmaṇi makuṭam cūṭṭippaṭar pukaḻāṅkavar[ k
ka] varnāṭaruḷip pāṅkuṟa muṉvayattūḻiyuṭṭeṉṉavar muvaruḷ māṉāparaṇaṉ
poṉmuṭiyāṉap parumaṇippacun=talai porukaḷattarittu vāraḷaviyakaḻal vira
keraḷaṉai muṉaivaiyiṟpiṭittut taṉatti vāraṇattaṭak kaḷiṟṟāllutaippiṭitta
ruḷi An=tamil perumpukaṭ cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟai veṇ
kavariyum ciṅkātaṉamum veṅkaḷakkuḻintu taṉmuṭi viḻattalai virittaṭi taḷan
toṭat tollaiyuḷmullaiyūr turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇā
ṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻirāmakuṭamuvar keṭa munintu viṭarkeḻu villavaṉmaṭi
k koṇṭu taṉṉāṭu viṭṭoṭik kāṭu pukkoḷippa vañciyam putumalar malain=tāṅke
ñcalil velai keḻa kān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟuttāhavamallaṉu mañcak ke
vutaṉ tāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavar ceṉaiyuṭ kaṇṭappayyaṉuṅ kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇ
ṭamark kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritar vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum karumuraṭ cāṅkama
yyaṉu mutalinar camarapiru vottuṭainimar cuṭarppoṉ noṭayaṅ(m) kari puraviyo
ṭum piṭittut taṉnāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu poṉṉār koḷḷippākkai yoḷḷeri ma
ṭuppittoru tanit taṇṭāṟ porukaṭaliliṅkaiyar komāṉ vikkiramabāhuviṉ maku
ṭamum muṟaṉukkut teṉṟamiḻmaṇṭala muḻuvatu yiḻamiḻan=teḻa kaṭaliḻam pukku Ilaṅkecaṉā
kiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇi muṭiyum kāṇṭaku taṉatākkit taṉ kaṉṉakucciyilum Āḻkaṭali
yiḻamuñ ciriteṉṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷ nāṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅku muṭikavi
tta viracalāmekaṉ porkkaḷattañcit taṉ kārkkaḷiṟiḻantu kavvaiyiṟṟoṭik kātali
yoṭun taṉṟaḻvaiyaip piṭittut tāyai mukkariya Āṅkavar mānam nikkiṟakākaRead nikkuvataṟkākami
ṭṭum vanta taṉ vārpoḻil Ularntu veṅkaḷattu turavan=tavac ciṅkaḷattarai
caṉ poṉnaṇi muṭiyuṅ kaṉnaraṉ vaḻivanturai koḷḷiḻattaraicaṉākiya cirkeḻu va
llavaṉ mataṉarājaṉ Elloḷirt taṭamaṇi muṭiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapulattiru kālāvatum
porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭara tiṉakaraṉ nāraṇa kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtaṉa Eṉ
ṟeṉai pallavaraicarai muṉaivayiṟ turatti vampalar tarupoḻil nakaruḷIn other meykīrti it is engraved vampalar tarupoḻil kampili nakaruḷ caḷukkiyar mā
ḷikai takarppittiḷakkamil villaval minavar veḻkulac caḷukkiyar vallavar kaucalar va
ṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cinturaṇayyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar Ān=tara ḻitalīkaḷaRead āntirar mutaliyaraicariṭu tiṟaikaḷum
Āṟiloṉṟavaṉi Uṭkūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷu mukantu nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantu koḷ
kuṭuvittu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟi niṉṟaśvamekañ ceytaraicu viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅ
ṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=ta perum pukaḻk kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rā
jādhirājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 29āvatu puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku Arddhayāmam tiruvamurtu cetaruḷa perumā
ṉ maturān=takaṉāṉa rājentracoḻaveṇkaḷanāṭṭaraiyaṉ nāḷoṉṟiṉukku vaitta patte
ṭṭukkuttal paḻavarici kuṟuṇikku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl Orāṇṭiṉukku nellu Eḻupat
taiṅkalamum neyyamirtu Āḻākkiṉukkum caṟkaraiyamirtu Āḻaākkiṉumkkum paruppamirtu
Uḻakkiṉukkum kaṟiyamirtukkum tayiramirtu nāḻikkum Aṭaikkāyamirtukkumāka Ōrāṇṭiṉukku
nellu Irupattoṉpatiṉ kalamum Aṇukkavāḷ māṟuvāṉ Oruvaṉukku puṭavai muta
l Uṭpaṭa nāṟpattaṟu kalamum Āka Ōrāṇṭiṉukku Arumoḻitevaṉ marakkālāl
nellu ṉūṟṟaimpatiṉkalattiṉukkum Uṭalāka paiyyūrkkoṭṭattu Eyilūrnilai Āmurā
ṉacoḷentraciṅkanallūr Ūrāriṭai nāṉ vilaikuṭuttu Iṟaiyiḻicci vilaikoṇṭa ni
lattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Ittevar tevatāṉam kāvaṉūrellaikkum ciṟupākkat
tellaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Accutanka vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
coḷentra ciṅka nallūr maṇivalaiyaṉ kuḻi
kucumaṉāṉa ceṟuvil melvarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kucuman vaṭiṉ [māca ?]
kku teṟkum ciṟuputteri karaikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicai ta vilaikkut tey kil
coḷendra ciṅkanallūrt tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiyār teva kku
ṇ kolāl kuḻi Āyiramum meṟpaṭiyār cantiviḷakkuppaṭṭi kuḻi muṉṉuṟṟirupatum taṇṇi
ppaṭṭi meṟpaṭi kolāl kuḻi muṉ śrīpātak kolāl
koṇṭa nilam veli Aiñcum piṭṭa cāli Eriki ṭāṟu māṟṟu maṭaikaḷālu m va
nāmāyum vāykkālkaḷāl nirkki vaṇṇam yum
Iṟai viṟka koṇṭa nilam veli mākkala
Iṟaikaṭṭina nel nūṟṟaiñpatin kalame Innel nūṟṟaiñpatin kalamuṅ koṇṭu
kuṭutten perumānmaturān=takanāṉa rājentracoḻaveṇkaḷa nāṭṭaraiyanen
Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
